meta.title: Throw To Win
meta.description: Throw your phone. The highest wins.

landing.subtitle: Throw your phone. Highest wins.
landing.desktopSubtext: Throw To Win uses your phone's motion sensors to measure how high you throw it. You need to physically throw your phone into the air.

consent.heading: Before you throw.
consent.line3: Your expensive TV, your window, your ceiling light — all at risk.
consent.line5: But whatever happens, it's on you.

permissions.heading: We need access.
permissions.motionSensor: Motion sensor — to measure your throw
permissions.cameraFailed: Could not start camera. Please check camera permissions in your settings.
permissions.unsupported: Your device doesn't support the required sensors.
permissions.unsupportedDetail: Throw To Win needs motion sensors and a camera.

prepare.heading: Ready?
prepare.instruction: Hold your phone and press the button when ready.

mypage.heading: My Throws
mypage.noThrows: No throws yet. Go throw your phone!

deviceDamage.title: Device Damage
deviceDamage.content: Throw To Win involves throwing your mobile device into the air. By using this service, you acknowledge that this activity carries inherent risk of damage to your device. Kosukuma Inc. is not responsible for any damage to your device resulting from use of this service.

personalInjury.title: Personal Injury
personalInjury.content: Throwing a mobile device may result in personal injury. Users assume all risk of injury to themselves or others. Kosukuma Inc. is not liable for any injuries sustained during use of this service.

propertyDamage.title: Property Damage
propertyDamage.content: Using this service may result in damage to surrounding property. Users are solely responsible for ensuring a safe environment before throwing their device.

thirdParty.title: Third Party Impact
thirdParty.content: Users must ensure their throws do not endanger or disturb other people. Any liability for impact on third parties rests entirely with the user.

accuracy.title: Record Accuracy
accuracy.content: Height measurements are estimates based on accelerometer data. Kosukuma Inc. does not guarantee the accuracy of any measurements or records.

dataLoss.title: Data Loss
dataLoss.content: All data is stored locally on your device. Changing devices, clearing browser data, or other actions may result in permanent loss of your records. Kosukuma Inc. is not responsible for any data loss.

common.error: Something went wrong. Let's try again!
common.practice: That was just practice. One more!
